productDisplayName: Skechers Women Bravos Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these Bravos shoes from skechers add an extra bounce to your step. With a great mesh-synthetic leather combination in attractive colors, these shoes team perfectly with casual wear. Look super stylish in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic leather overlays for added durability and style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilation Brand tab on tongue and brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Premium cushioned insole and moulded lightweight phylon midsole for comfort and support Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Flex grooves for better flexibility Horizontal ridges on the outsole for improved traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
